Package microui.layout

Class LinearLayoutParams

java.lang.Object
microui.layout.LinearAxisLayoutParams
microui.layout.LinearLayoutParams
All Implemented Interfaces:
LayoutParams
public class LinearLayoutParams extends LinearAxisLayoutParams
Layout parameters for LinearLayout.

Concrete implementation of LinearAxisLayoutParams specifically for use with LinearLayout. Provides convenient constructors for common use cases.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LinearLayoutParams(float weight)
    Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and center alignment.
    LinearLayoutParams(float weight, int align)
    Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and uniform alignment.
    LinearLayoutParams(float weight, int alignX, int alignY)
    Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and alignment values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getAlignX()
    Returns the horizontal alignment value.
    int
    getAlignY()
    Returns the vertical alignment value.

    Methods inherited from class microui.layout.LinearAxisLayoutParams

    getWeight

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • LinearLayoutParams

      public LinearLayoutParams(float weight, int alignX, int alignY)
      Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and alignment values.
      Parameters:
      weight - the weight of the component (0.0 to 1.0)
      alignX - horizontal alignment (-1 for left, 0 for center, 1 for right)
      alignY - vertical alignment (-1 for top, 0 for center, 1 for bottom)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is outside its valid range

    • LinearLayoutParams

      public LinearLayoutParams(float weight, int align)
      Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and uniform alignment.

      Uses the same alignment value for both horizontal and vertical axes.

      Parameters:
      weight - the weight of the component (0.0 to 1.0)
      align - alignment value used for both axes (-1 for left/top, 0 for center, 1 for right/bottom)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is outside its valid range

    • LinearLayoutParams

      public LinearLayoutParams(float weight)
      Constructs LinearLayoutParams with specified weight and center alignment.

      Uses center alignment (0) for both horizontal and vertical axes by default.

      Parameters:
      weight - the weight of the component (0.0 to 1.0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if weight is outside the valid range (0.0 to 1.0)

  • Method Details

    • getAlignX

      public int getAlignX()
      Returns the horizontal alignment value.
      Returns:
      the horizontal alignment value (-1 for left, 0 for center, 1 for right)

    • getAlignY

      public int getAlignY()
      Returns the vertical alignment value.
      Returns:
      the vertical alignment value (-1 for top, 0 for center, 1 for bottom)
